description: This seed might be more accurately described as a bulb.  You dug it out of the home it had made and chopped off its extremities.  You are now preparing to plant it in a new location.  Only, in this instance the hole was dug into the chest of a dead vampire minion and the new location is nestled against the still-beating heart of a patient.

What reason could anyone have for making a bionic power generator that runs off the blood of vampires?  After some thought, one option that occurs to you would be the possibility that by limiting the fuel options, a vampire is also limiting the opportunities for a rogue minion to use its bionics against its master.
A jar-like container that includes a set of vocal cords with a large hood at the top of them and rootlike tendrils at the base connecting to a microchip.
A jar-like container that includes a set of oversized and reinforced vocal cords with a large hood at the top of them and rootlike tendrils at the base connecting to a microchip.
A syringe that extends out into two tubes that snake up through the nostrils and down to the lungs in order to get the spores deep into their new home, where they can best spread through the body.
A compact bionic module designed for slotting in data cores that instantly teach you a proficiency or martial art.
A data core designed to provide a specific proficiency level of knowledge to its user as long as it's installed.  Requires an installed data shunt to use.
